title: Home Recording on the Tascam 424 MKIII: Guitar & Bass to Tape
subtitle: REC-24 · A 3-week home-recording intensive
description: Go from never having recorded to capturing real multitrack guitar and bass songs on a 4-track cassette Portastudio, then pulling them into a computer to finish. A hands-on course in the Tascam 424 MKIII: signal flow and gain staging, getting guitar, bass, and pedals into the machine cleanly, recording to tape with dbx, keeping time to a click track, overdubbing, punching in, bouncing tracks to free up space, mixing on the built-in board, and transferring the result to Ableton Live as a stereo bounce or as four separate stems. Taught through daily lectures, machine time at the controls, quizzes, and three recording projects that build into a finished song.

lessons.title: Course Overview & How to Use It
Machine Reference: Signal Flow, Connections, dbx & Resources

sections.title: Week 1: The Machine & Your First Track

lessons.title: Days 1–7: The Machine, Signal Flow, Gain, Pedals In, Recording to Tape
Days 8–14: The Click Track, Overdubbing, Punch-In, Bouncing, Pedals & Tone
Days 15–21: Mixing on the 424, the Mixdown, Transferring to Ableton, Finishing
